chunks.page_summary: This page provides step-by-step instructions for installing the Rheonics Control Panel Lite software, including guidance on updating existing versions.
chunks.extracted_text:
Phone: +1 713 234 0863

Installing RCP Lite Installer

Modified on: Fri, 3 Jul, 2020 at 11:40 AM

If you have installed an old version of RCP, and want to do an update for a new version, You could use the "RCP_Lite_VX.X.X.X.exe" installer provided by Rheonics and skip the full install. Double click on the file to start the install process.

[File Explorer Window - List of Installers]
  Name
  Test Installers
  RCPLite_V4.1.1.5_V2
  RCPLite_V4.3.0.2
  RCPSetup_V4.3.0.2
  Rheonics_RCP_Manual

1. Click Next on the dialog below to start the installation process

[Setup - Rheonics Control Panel - Welcome Wizard]
  Window Title: Setup - Rheonics Control Panel
  rheonics
  Welcome to the Rheonics Control Panel Setup Wizard
  This will install Rheonics Control Panel version 4.3.0.2 on your computer.
  It is recommended that you close all other applications before continuing.
  Click Next to continue, or Cancel to exit Setup.
  Control Panel Setup Wizard
  Buttons: Next >, Cancel

2. A dialog will appear to select the installation directories. Use the default, unless there is a reason to select a different location, and click "Next".

[Setup - Rheonics Control Panel - Select Destination Location]
  Window Title: Setup - Rheonics Control Panel
  Select Destination Location
  Where should Rheonics Control Panel be installed?
  Setup will install Rheonics Control Panel into the following folder.
  To continue, click Next. If you would like to select a different folder, click Browse...
  Default path: C:\Program Files\Rheonics Control Panel
  Button: Browse...
  At least 273.0 MB of free disk space is required.
  Buttons: < Back, Next >, Cancel
key_facts: This document outlines the installation procedure for the RCP Lite Installer.
Users can update an existing RCP installation by directly using the provided "RCP_Lite_VX.X.X.X.exe" installer, skipping a full re-installation.
The installation process will install Rheonics Control Panel version 4.3.0.2.
The installation requires at least 273.0 MB of free disk space.
The default installation directory for the Rheonics Control Panel is "C:\Program Files\Rheonics Control Panel".
diagram_labels: Welcome to the Rheonics Control Panel Setup Wizard
Where should Rheonics Control Panel be installed?
warnings_notes: It is recommended that you close all other applications before continuing.
Use the default installation directories unless there is a specific reason to choose a different location.

chunks.page_summary: This page provides step-by-step instructions with corresponding screenshots for installing and completing the setup of the Rheonics Control Panel software.
chunks.extracted_text:
3. Click check box to create a Desktop shortcut, and click “Next”:
Setup - Rheonics Control Panel
Select Additional Tasks
Which additional tasks should be performed?
Select the additional tasks you would like Setup to perform while installing Rheonics Control Panel, then click Next.
Additional shortcuts:
Create a desktop shortcut
< Back
Next >
Cancel
4. Click “Install” to complete the installation process of RCP:
Setup - Rheonics Control Panel
Ready to Install
Setup is now ready to begin installing Rheonics Control Panel on your computer.
Click Install to continue with the installation, or click Back if you want to review or change any settings.
Destination location:
C:\Program Files\Rheonics\ControlPanel
Additional tasks:
Additional shortcuts:
Create a desktop shortcut
< Back
Install
Cancel
5. The installer will extract the files in the default destination.
Setup - Rheonics Control Panel
Installing
Please wait while Setup installs Rheonics Control Panel on your computer.
Extracting files...
C:\Program Files\LabVIEW\RunTimeEngine2012.exe
Cancel
6. Click “Finish” to finish the install process.
Setup - Rheonics Control Panel
rheonics
Completing the Rheonics Control Panel Setup Wizard
Setup has finished installing Rheonics Control Panel on your computer. The application may be launched by selecting the installed shortcuts.
Click Finish to exit Setup.
Control Panel
Setup Wizard
Finish
RCP software is now updated and ready to use.
key_facts: The installation process involves selecting additional tasks, such as creating a desktop shortcut for the Rheonics Control Panel.
The default installation path for the Rheonics Control Panel is C:\Program Files\Rheonics\ControlPanel.
During installation, the setup extracts necessary files, including 'LabVIEW\RunTimeEngine2012.exe'.
After completing the setup wizard, the Rheonics Control Panel software will be updated and ready to use.
diagram_labels: Which additional tasks should be performed?
Select the additional tasks you would like Setup to perform while installing Rheonics Control Panel, then click Next.
Setup is now ready to begin installing Rheonics Control Panel on your computer.
Click Install to continue with the installation, or click Back if you want to review or change any settings.
Please wait while Setup installs Rheonics Control Panel on your computer.
Completing the Rheonics Control Panel Setup Wizard
Setup has finished installing Rheonics Control Panel on your computer. The application may be launched by selecting the installed shortcuts.
